title: Cheryl Dudley
compiled_truth: Cheryl Dudley is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-29 to 2001-06-08), Cheryl Dudley sent 22 and received 195 emails, totalling 217 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (16), [Shawna Flynn](people/shawna-flynn) (14), [Mary Smith](people/mary-smith) (14), [Elsa Villarreal](people/elsa-villarreal) (13), [Kimberlee Bennick](people/kimberlee-bennick) (13).
